diffs.diff:
--- a/find_generator.py
+++ b/find_generator.py
@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
+import torch

+import inspect

+from speechbrain.inference.enhancement import SpectralMaskEnhancement

+

+print('Loading MG+ model...')

+model = SpectralMaskEnhancement.from_hparams(

+    source='speechbrain/metricgan-plus-voicebank',

+    savedir='/opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank'

+)

+

+print('\n=== Named children ===')

+for name, child in model.named_children():

+    print(f'  {name}: {type(child).__name__}')

+

+print('\n=== Named modules (top 30) ===')

+for i, (name, mod) in enumerate(model.named_modules()):

+    if i >= 30:

+        break

+    params = sum(p.numel() for p in mod.parameters())

+    print(f'  {name}: {type(mod).__name__} ({params} params)')

+

+print('\n=== Checking specific attribute paths ===')

+for path in ['enhance_model', 'mods', 'modules', 'hparams']:

+    if hasattr(model, path):

+        obj = getattr(model, path)

+        print(f'  model.{path}: {type(obj).__name__}')

+        if hasattr(obj, 'enhance_model'):

+            print(f'    -> obj.enhance_model: {type(obj.enhance_model).__name__}')

+        if hasattr(obj, 'named_children'):

+            for name, child in obj.named_children():

+                print(f'    -> {name}: {type(child).__name__}')

+

+print('\n=== Checking hparams for modules ===')

+hp = model.hparams

+for attr in sorted(dir(hp)):

+    if attr.startswith('_'):

+        continue

+    val = getattr(hp, attr)

+    if isinstance(val, torch.nn.Module):

+        print(f'  hparams.{attr}: {type(val).__name__} ({sum(p.numel() for p in val.parameters())} params)')

+

+print('\n=== Trying model.mods ===')

+if hasattr(model, 'mods'):

+    mods = model.mods

+    print(f'model.mods type: {type(mods).__name__}')

+    if hasattr(mods, 'enhance_model'):

+        gen = mods.enhance_model

+        print(f'FOUND! model.mods.enhance_model: {type(gen).__name__}')

+        print(f'Params: {sum(p.numel() for p in gen.parameters()):,}')

+        print(gen)

+    else:

+        for name in dir(mods):

+            if not name.startswith('_'):

+                print(f'  mods.{name}: {type(getattr(mods, name)).__name__}')

+

+print('\n=== Trying model.modules dict ===')

+if hasattr(model, 'modules') and callable(model.modules):

+    # It's the nn.Module.modules() method

+    print('model.modules is callable (nn.Module method)')

+

+print('\n=== Checking __dict__ ===')

+for k, v in sorted(model.__dict__.items()):

+    if isinstance(v, torch.nn.Module):

+        print(f'  {k}: {type(v).__name__} ({sum(p.numel() for p in v.parameters())} params)')

+    elif isinstance(v, dict):

+        for k2, v2 in v.items():

+            if isinstance(v2, torch.nn.Module):

+                print(f'  {k}[{k2}]: {type(v2).__name__} ({sum(p.numel() for p in v2.parameters())} params)')
